card_eligibility.source_phrase: Minuteman Library cards are available at no cost to: Massachusetts residents, Town of Brookline employees, Brookline public or private school students, Owners of property in Brookline
card_eligibility.source_block:
Who can get a card?

Minuteman Library cards are available at no cost to:

Massachusetts residents

Town of Brookline employees

Brookline public or private school students

Owners of property in Brookline

Out-of-state residents should refer to our guidelines for out-of-state cardholders .
